data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the Facebook Messenger booking option.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a Facebook Messenger booking option, as stated in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any confirmation or details regarding the implementation or functionality of this specific booking option. The lack of concrete API reads or persisted state checks related to Facebook Messenger leads to an inconclusive status for this validation step.
gaps: No evidence confirming the existence or functionality of the Facebook Messenger booking option.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the Facebook Messenger booking option.
